description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for CI/CD of mingw64 packages. The workflow should trigger on push and pull request events. It consists of two jobs: build and publish. The build job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment in a debian:buster container, checks out the repository, installs dependencies, builds a debian package, and uploads the build directory as an artifact. The publish job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment in a python:3.7-slim-buster container, downloads the build artifact, and publishes the debian package to Cloudsmith using the cloudsmith-cli.
